subcodes.first_line: God willing, may ye ever be and continue to be blessed through His divine favors and remain mindful of His remembrance. Praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال بعنایت الهی فائز باشید و بذکرش ذاکر الحمد لله در
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
